reviews.review_description: The rig is completely seamless, the game is so scary, and the graphics are amazing, not much content, but I know this game will be great, I really hope there will more players! Best gorilla tag fangame.
The song is creepy as hell

Met the owner and it’s really fun.


Edit: it’s been 9 months since I made this comment. Pls update this peak game.

Truly an amazing game. The graphics are awesome. The movement is really good.
The monster is actually scary. The spawnables are cool. I just wish there were people online.
Overall I recommend downloading.

reviews.review_title: Met the developer and owner of the game
reviews.review_description: It was fun with the developer of the game with his ….. friend

reviews.review_title: Got to be one of the best game I ever
reviews.review_description: Played get this game it’s scary but fun and it’s so fun you should try it out
